interface.longDescription: An interactive Kazakh coach: targeted drills, progress tracking, and mistake memory, backed by the RunDrill MCP engine. Starts at A0 (the Kazakh alphabet) and grows with you.
defaultPrompt: Quiz me on what I got wrong last time.
